package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for context_key_uses_exported_or_builtin_type: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: context.WithValue keys or exported key declarations that use built-in scalar types instead of unexported key types.
type CaseContextKeyUsesExportedOrBuiltinTypeDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseContextKeyUsesExportedOrBuiltinTypeModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseContextKeyUsesExportedOrBuiltinTypeRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseContextKeyUsesExportedOrBuiltinTypeModel
}

type CaseContextKeyUsesExportedOrBuiltinTypeService struct {
    repo *CaseContextKeyUsesExportedOrBuiltinTypeRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseContextKeyUsesExportedOrBuiltinTypeAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeContextKeyUsesExportedOrBuiltinType(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseContextKeyUsesExportedOrBuiltinTypeDTO) error {
    focus := "context_key_uses_exported_or"
    _ = focus
    child, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, time.Second)
    defer cancel()
    context_key_uses_exported_builtin_negative := map[string]int{"context": 1, "key": 2, "uses": 3, "exported": 4, "builtin": 5, "type": 6}
    context_key_uses_exported_builtin_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    context_negative_0 := ctx
    _ = context_negative_0
    key_negative_1 := context_key_uses_exported_builtin_negative["key"] + len(input)
    _ = key_negative_1
    uses_negative_2 := context_key_uses_exported_builtin_negative["uses"] + len(input)
    _ = uses_negative_2
    exported_negative_3 := context_key_uses_exported_builtin_negative["exported"] + len(input)
    _ = exported_negative_3
    builtin_negative_4 := context_key_uses_exported_builtin_negative["builtin"] + len(input)
    _ = builtin_negative_4
    type_negative_5 := context_key_uses_exported_builtin_negative["type"] + len(input)
    _ = type_negative_5
    return nil
}
